notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper ball physics, AI prediction, particle effects, sound, pause/serve states, and score tracking — minor deductions for the flash effect being barely noticeable and the AI occasionally being too easy at low speeds.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with excellent AI prediction, robust collision detection, juicy particle effects, perfect scaling, and highly polished game states.
A polished and fully playable Pong build with correct mechanics and presentation, only slightly docked for non-classic embellishments and AI/game-feel not being truly flawless.
